slide1.subtitle: Rockford Management System
slide1.tagline: Reshaping Midwest Cargo Flows — Establishing RFD as a Sustainable Global Logistics Hub

slide2.title: The RFD Proximity Problem:
slide2.subtitle: Overcoming ORD Dominance in Midwest Cargo
slide2.description: RFD sits in the shadow of O'Hare. Breaking this gravitational pull requires a fundamentally different value proposition.

silos.title: ORD Dominance
items: O'Hare handles 80%+ of Midwest air cargo
Established carrier networks flow to ORD by default

silos.title: Fragmented Solutions
items: No single end-to-end supply chain operator at RFD
No unified digital platform for cargo management
E-commerce DDP flows bypassing RFD entirely

silos.title: Backload Dependency
items: Global B2B/B2C markets untapped from RFD

mobileModal.title: The RFD Challenge
mobileModal.subtitle: Three systemic barriers preventing RFD volume growth.

slide3.title: RCCSCS LLC —
slide3.subtitle: A consortium-led master-lease of Building 176 delivering end-to-end supply chain services at RFD.

features.label: ECCF & CFS Operations
features.description: Dedicated Express Carrier Consignment Facilities and Container Freight Stations for rapid processing of inbound and outbound cargo.

features.label: FTZ Management
features.description: Capitol-operated Foreign Trade Zone enabling duty deferral, manipulation, and export cargo hub operations within Building 176.

features.label: Global DDP E-Commerce
features.description: 5-to-7-day Duty Paid door-to-door solutions via SF Express and Yun Express, eliminating random backload dependency.

features.label: Regulatory Compliance
features.description: Full Food & Pharma sector compliance via the RFDMS platform — automated, auditable, and always ready for inspection.

features.label: Cross-Dock & Last Mile
features.description: Uni-Uni specialized cross-docking and parcel handling for small cargo and B2C e-commerce flows.

features.label: RFDMS Digital Core
features.description: Unified platform integrating all inbound/outbound logistics, compliance, customs, and regulatory requirements across partners.

slide4.title: The Partnership Flotilla
slide4.subtitle: Turlough Sheehan has assembled a multi-partner consortium whose collective capabilities create a unique 'hub within a hub' at RFD.

partners.name: T. Sheehan & RFD Airport
partners.detail: Consortium lead and master-lease holder for Building 176. Direct relationship with Rockford Airport authority.

partners.name: Micom CHB
partners.detail: Core compliance and brokerage services. Licensed CHB for import/export declarations, HS classification, and regulatory submissions.

partners.name: Capitol Warehousing & FTZ
partners.detail: Foreign Trade Zone management, Container Freight Station operations, and Export Cargo Hub within Building 176.

partners.name: SF Express
partners.detail: Key B2B and B2C DDP courier for China-US lanes. Priority express services with secure Building 176 access.

partners.name: Yun Express
partners.detail: Cross-border e-commerce courier for Asia-US B2C flows. Integrated into Building 176 handling facilities.

partners.name: Rich Sale
partners.detail: Initial code-share operations to kick-start inbound traffic and establish reliable cargo volume at RFD.

partners.name: Uni-Uni
partners.detail: Specialized cross-docking and small parcel last-mile handling for B2C e-commerce fulfilment.

partners.name: BGI
partners.detail: Strategic international agent for network expansion across Asia-Pacific and European corridors.

partners.name: NG Terminal
partners.detail: Terminal and ground handling expertise supporting Building 176 operational capacity.

partners.name: UBS UK Ltd
partners.detail: Sales and business development across the UK and EU, securing balanced two-way cargo flows.

partners.name: YSL Korea
partners.detail: Korea-based agent driving volume from SE Asia corridors into RFD via the RCCSCS network.

slide5.title: The Hub
slide5.subtitle: A specialized floor plan within Building 176 at RFD — distinct operational zones all connected by the RFDMS digital core.

zones.label: ECCF & CFS
zones.description: Express Carrier Consignment Facility and Container Freight Station for rapid cargo processing and documentary compliance.

zones.label: FTZ (Fenced-Off)
zones.description: Capitol-managed Foreign Trade Zone with secure perimeter. Enables duty deferral and special customs procedures.

zones.label: RFDMS Platform
zones.description: Central RFDMS digital platform unifying all partner operations — logistics, customs, compliance, and regulatory workflows.

zones.label: SF Express
zones.description: Dedicated handling area for SF Express B2B and B2C international shipments. Secure access from FTZ zone.

zones.label: Yun Express
zones.description: Dedicated zone for Yun Express cross-border e-commerce. Last-mile cross-docking with Uni-Uni collaboration.

zones.label: Cross-Dock & Last Mile
zones.description: Uni-Uni specialized cross-docking zone for small parcel sorting, final-mile dispatch, and B2C fulfilment.

floorLabels.secureLabel: Secure Access Areas for SF & Yun Express

slide6.title: RFD as a
slide6.subtitle: A cohesive flotilla of services connecting RCCSCS at RFD to B2B/B2C hubs across UK, EU, GCC, and SE Asia.

routes.description: Regular cargo lanes to UK distribution centres. UBS UK Ltd manages sales and business development to secure balanced two-way flows.
BGI-managed EU network connecting RFD to major European logistics corridors across BeNeLux, DACH and beyond.
Gulf Cooperation Council access via Saudi hub. Growing e-commerce and industrial cargo corridor for Midwest-origin goods.
YSL Korea channels Southeast Asian cargo flows into RFD, providing balanced return volumes and e-commerce fulfilment.
Primary inbound DDP cargo lanes from China via SF Express and Yun Express. 5-7 day door-to-door service.

slide6.ddpDescription: Duty Paid, door-to-door delivery eliminating the reliance on random backloads and enabling predictable, sustainable cargo volume.

slide8.title: Compliance
slide8.subtitle: Full Food & Pharma compliance via RFDMS — IoT monitoring, automated documentation, and multi-standard certification.

iotBanner.title: Food & Pharma Regulatory Use Case
iotBanner.description: RFDMS automates compliance for Food and Pharmaceutical cargo flowing through RFD — fully monitored and documented end-to-end.

items.label: Temperature Monitoring
items.body: Continuous IoT sensor data for cold-chain cargo. Configurable thresholds with automated breach alerts and timestamped compliance records.

items.label: Automated Compliance Docs
items.body: RFDMS auto-generates Food Safety, Pharma GDP, and customs documentation. Audit-ready records for USDA, FDA, and CBP requirements.

items.label: Micom CHB Integration
items.body: On-site Customs House Brokerage seamlessly connected to RFDMS for real-time HS classification, PGA flags, and entry filing.

items.label: Pharma Cold-Chain (Asia→US)
items.body: GMP/GDP-aligned shipments from Asia to Midwest US market via RFD, with RFDMS-sealed chain-of-custody records.

cards.title: Customs Automation
cards.subtitle: CBP
cards.description: RFDMS integrates with Micom CHB for automated CBP entry filing, PGA screening, and ISF submissions.

cards.title: FTZ Compliance
cards.subtitle: Legal
cards.description: Capitol Warehousing operates a CBP-approved FTZ with full weekly entry processing and manipulation authority.

cards.title: Food & Pharma Safety
cards.subtitle: FDA/USDA
cards.description: Full FSMA, PACA, and GDP compliance for perishable and pharmaceutical cargo via RFDMS automated workflows.

cards.title: Platform Security
cards.subtitle: Tech
cards.description: RFDMS platform built on zero-trust architecture with AES-256 encryption and role-based access for all partners.

features.title: Customs Automation
features.description: Automated CBP entry, ISF, and PGA filings via Micom CHB integration.

features.title: FTZ Zone 176

slide10.title: Operational
slide10.subtitle: 3 parallel tracks · Q2 2026 → 2027+ · Operations × Technology × Global Expansion

milestones.title: Building 176 Lease
milestones.detail: Turlough Sheehan executes master lease for Building 176 at RFD on behalf of RCCSCS LLC. Facility zoning, partner access agreements, and layout planning completed. ECCF, CFS, FTZ sections demarcated and handed to respective operators.

milestones.title: ECCF & CFS Launch
milestones.detail: Micom CHB establishes on-site customs desk. Capitol Warehousing activates CFS and Export Cargo Hub. First commercial shipments processed through ECCF. SF Express and Yun Express secure access lanes operational.

milestones.title: FTZ Activation
milestones.detail: CBP-approved FTZ Zone activated under Capitol management. Weekly entry processing and manipulation authority in operation. Inverted tariff programs available to all Building 176 tenants. RFDMS FTZ module integrated for real-time inventory tracking.

milestones.title: Full Operational Capacity
milestones.detail: All six Building 176 zones fully operational. Uni-Uni cross-dock running B2C fulfilment. Food and Pharma compliance workflows live via RFDMS. RFD authority reporting confirms consistent cargo volume growth targets met.

milestones.title: RFDMS Platform Deploy
milestones.detail: RFDMS platform deployed with partner access portals for all 11 consortium members. Real-time cargo visibility across all Building 176 zones. Automated customs document generation connected to Micom CBP filing system.

milestones.title: Food & Pharma Compliance
milestones.detail: FSMA prior notice filing automated via RFDMS. Cold-chain IoT sensor integration live for temperature-controlled cargo. Pharma GDP documentation workflows operational. FDA Drug Import and USDA APHIS phytosanitary auto-generation active.

milestones.title: DDP E-Commerce Platform
milestones.detail: SF Express and Yun Express DDP routes fully integrated with RFDMS label generation, tracking, and delivery confirmation. US national last-mile carriers connected. Real-time tracking from RFD to consumer doorstep.

milestones.title: Analytics & Reporting
milestones.detail: Volume reporting dashboard for RFD authority showing real-time cargo throughput, DDP shipment volumes, FTZ utilisation rates, and compliance KPIs. Monthly ESG and sustainability reporting for food/pharma operations.

milestones.title: Code-Share Launch
milestones.detail: Rich Sale code-share operations kick-start inbound traffic to RFD. Initial cargo volume establishes handling precedents and operational readiness. Micom CHB pre-registers importers for accelerated clearance.

milestones.title: UK & EU Market Entry
milestones.detail: UBS UK Ltd begins active sales into UK distribution networks. BGI launches EU corridor campaigns targeting BeNeLux and DACH importers. Outbound US-origin cargo sales provide balanced two-way flow from Q3.

milestones.title: GCC & SE Asia Expansion
milestones.detail: BGI activates Gulf Cooperation Council sales channel via Saudi Arabia hub. YSL Korea channels SE Asian export volumes to RFD. Combined inbound volumes from all four global corridors provide sustainable, balanced flows.

milestones.title: Network Effects
milestones.detail: Critical mass of global agents, couriers, and DDP volumes create a self-reinforcing cargo flywheel at RFD. Every new partner adds route density. RCCSCS LLC becomes the default Midwest alternative to ORD for international cargo.
